title: AI Marketing Heatmap Tools Review: Hotjar vs Crazy Egg vs Mouseflow for Small Business - 2026
description: Review Hotjar, Crazy Egg, Mouseflow, and other AI marketing heatmap tools for user behavior tracking and analysis. Find the best marketing heatmap solution!
content:
Heatmap Challenges for Small Businesses

Small businesses need heatmap analysis: user behavior tracking, click analysis, scroll patterns. Heatmap tools enable visual tracking, session recording, and UX insights.

Hotjar is a leading tool for small businesses, offering professional Heatmap features.

  • Core Capabilities: Professional Heatmap, user-friendly interface, comprehensive features

For small businesses, choose Crazy Egg for small business friendly features. For best Heatmap, choose Hotjar. For analysis, choose Mouseflow. For enterprise, choose Lucky Orange. We recommend Crazy Egg for small businesses combined with Hotjar for best Heatmap, for optimal results.
